description: React component for the Reports page in an insurance fraud detection platform. Supports generating reports with filters, viewing report history, and rendering detailed report data and claim-like objects.
published: classes”: [],  (none explicitly defined here, just React functional component)  ,

methods.name: isClaimLike
methods.description: Type guard to determine if an object resembles a claim record based on known claim fields.

methods.name: getClaimRiskLevel
methods.description: Calculates the risk level string from a claim-like object, based on explicit risk_level field or fraud_score.

methods.name: formatCurrency
methods.description: Formats a number or string representing a monetary value into a localized dollar string.

methods.name: ReportsPage
methods.description: Main React functional component for the Reports page, managing state and rendering report generation and history.
